summary: Iteration 15: Full backend + frontend testing of 8 new feature areas. All 12 required test scenarios passed. Backend 17/17 tests pass. Bank Transactions full CRUD verified end-to-end. Subscription Contract End Date column confirmed. COMPLEX pricing 'Add to Cart' logic correct. TEST_CatalogProduct bullets showing. Cart subscription start date picker functional.

issues: Uses native HTML date input (browser default picker) rather than shadcn calendar component. Functional but slightly inconsistent with rest of UI. Minor cosmetic issue only.

critical_code_review_comments: ProductDetail.tsx isRFQ logic: `isRFQ = pricing_complexity === 'REQUEST_FOR_QUOTE' || (pricing_complexity === 'COMPLEX' && (!pricing || pricing.total === 0))` - correctly handles COMPLEX+priced products showing Add to Cart. ✅
OfferingCard.tsx bullets: `product.card_bullets || product.bullets || product.bullets_included` - fallback chain works correctly. ✅
StickyPurchaseSummary.tsx: CTA button bg-slate-900 (dark navy) confirmed. Currency prop correctly passed from useAuth().customer.currency. ✅
BankTransactionsTab.tsx: Full CRUD with modal, filters, logs, export CSV. Well-structured component. ✅
Admin.tsx: Contract End column in subscriptions table correctly shows contract_end_date?.slice(0,10). Edit modal has both Start Date and Contract End Date inputs. ✅
Cart.tsx: Subscription start date section renders conditionally only for subscription items. Uses native HTML date input (type=date) with min/max constraints (tomorrow to +30 days). Functional. ✅
Backend: BankTransaction CRUD with logs array tracking created/updated actions, net_amount auto-calculated. All endpoints admin-protected. ✅
Backend startup migration: backfills contract_end_date for existing subscriptions (12 months from start). Verified working with test data.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test bank transactions during testing. 2 test transactions (TEST-UI-001, TEST-EDIT-001) remain in DB from UI test runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 15 features verified and passing: (1) COMPLEX pricing with price shows Add to Cart button (prod_zoho_books_express, $1048.95); (2) TEST_CatalogProduct in test-category shows 3 bullets on store card; (3) CTA buttons are dark navy (bg-slate-900); (4) Admin Subscriptions has Contract End column + editable field in edit modal; (5) Bank Transactions tab has full CRUD - create/edit/delete/logs/export all working; (6) Cart shows Subscription Start Date date picker (native HTML input type=date) for subscription items. Minor note: Cart uses native HTML date picker not shadcn calendar for subscription start date.

verified_features.add_to_cart_complex_pricing: PASS - prod_zoho_books_express (COMPLEX, $1048.95) shows 'Add to cart' button, not 'Request a Quote'
verified_features.subscriptions_contract_end_column: PASS - Table headers: [Sub ID, Customer, Email, Plan, Status, Start Date, Contract End, Created, Renewal, Cancel Date, Amount, Payment, Actions]
verified_features.subscriptions_edit_modal_contract_end: PASS - admin-sub-contract-end-input and admin-sub-start-input both present in edit modal
verified_features.bank_transactions_tab_loads: PASS - Filters (Source/Status/Type), Export CSV, + Add Transaction buttons all present
verified_features.bank_transactions_create: PASS - Created TEST-UI-001, amount=500, fees=5, net=495.00 shown correctly
verified_features.bank_transactions_in_table: PASS - Transaction appears immediately after creation with 'Transaction created' toast
verified_features.bank_transactions_edit_and_logs: PASS - Edit works, logs show 'Created' and 'Updated' entries with timestamps and change details
verified_features.cart_subscription_start_date: PASS - Subscription Start Date section with native date input (min=tomorrow, max=+30days) appears in cart for subscription items
verified_features.product_detail_spacing: PASS - space-y-8 (32px) between sections (What's Included, Not Included, What We Need From You, etc.)
verified_features.currency_display: PASS - Shows 'All prices in USD' for admin user with USD currency (not hardcoded CAD)
